experience.title: Director of Technology
responsibilities: Led the design and implementation of software architecture for multiple cloud-based applications using AWS.
Managed a team of engineers to develop secure coding practices in line with cybersecurity frameworks.
Oversaw the migration of legacy infrastructure to a modern cloud environment, reducing operational costs by 30%.
Implemented Agile methodologies to enhance project delivery efficiency and team collaboration.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
responsibilities: Contributed to the development of machine learning algorithms for data analysis and predictive modeling.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver software solutions that met client requirements.
Developed and maintained system documentation, ensuring compliance with industry standards.
